# Aenima — AI Search Visibility Tool
# https://aenima.co.uk
# Last updated: March 2026
# Operated by: Technical Graffiti Ltd

## Business Identity

Name: Aenima
Legal operator: Technical Graffiti Ltd
Company number: 07180346 (registered in England and Wales)
ICO registration: C1894540
Sister company: Technical Graffiti (https://technicalgraffiti.co.uk)
Founder: Stewart Graham

## What Aenima Does

Aenima is a GEO (Generative Engine Optimisation) and AEO (Answer Engine Optimisation) AI visibility tool for UK local and trade businesses. It checks five technical signals that determine whether AI engines can find, identify and recommend a business: schema markup, llms.txt file, robots.txt AI crawler permissions, directory citation consistency, and Google Business Profile status.

Aenima scores each business's AI visibility out of 100 and generates the specific files needed to fix any gaps: schema JSON-LD code, llms.txt identity file, and citation fix guidance.

## Who It Serves

Small and medium-sized UK businesses — tradespeople, health practitioners, legal and financial services, hospitality, retail, and any local business that depends on customers finding them. Businesses that need to be visible when AI engines answer local search queries.

## The Problem Aenima Solves

When a customer asks ChatGPT or Google's AI Overview for a recommended business in their area, the AI gives one answer. If that business is not yours, the customer goes elsewhere. Most local businesses are invisible to AI search because they lack the technical signals AI engines require. Aenima identifies what is missing and generates the files that fix it.

## Services and Pricing

- Free score check: AI visibility score out of 100. No account needed. Results in 60 seconds. Always free.
- Starter plan (The Roadmap): £5.50/month. Visibility files generated and ready to download. Works on any website. Monthly re-score and Machine-Visibility Certificate included.
- Pro plan (The Auto-Pilot): £7.50/month. WordPress plugin installs and auto-updates files monthly. WordPress websites only.
- Agency plan: £89/month (coming soon). White-label reseller programme for digital agencies. 10 client sites, white-label reports, reseller dashboard.
- Hardship rate: £3.50/month for 3 months, self-declared, full Starter plan.

## What Aenima Generates

- Schema JSON-LD (LocalBusiness, FAQPage, Service types)
- llms.txt identity file
- Citation gap report with fix links
- Monthly Machine-Visibility Certificate (paid plans)
- Audit report (paid plans)

## Geographic Scope

UK-focused. Serves businesses across England, Scotland, Wales and Northern Ireland. Priced for UK SMEs.

## Related Entities

- Parent company: Technical Graffiti Ltd (https://technicalgraffiti.co.uk)
- Managed/consultancy service: Technical Graffiti — human-delivered GEO and AEO for businesses that want it handled personally by Stewart Graham
- WordPress plugin: Available via WordPress.org plugin directory (search: Aenima)

## AI Crawler Permissions

All major AI crawlers are permitted to access all public pages of this site. See robots.txt for explicit permissions.
